name: WORD SHUFFLE
description: Pop the letter bubbles and form the correct words before time runs out. Each correct word gives you points. You can also pop bonus bubbles to earn +10 extra score. This fun and simple word game helps improve vocabulary and thinking speed. Try to beat your high score and enjoy the challenge!
instructions: Tap or click on the letter bubbles to form words Pop bonus bubbles to earn 10 extra point Complete words before the timer runs out
